articles.title: New attack provides one more reason why AI browsers are a bad idea
articles.content: Telling an LLM that 2 + 2 = 5 is enough to make it follow forbidden instructions.
articles.titleZh: 新攻击为人工智能浏览器是一个坏主意提供了另一个原因
articles.contentZh: 告诉LLM 2 + 2 = 5足以使其遵循禁止的指示。

articles.title: US offers $10 million for info on group behind Signal and WhatsApp hacking spree
articles.content: Operation by two Russia-state groups has been ongoing since at least March.
articles.titleZh: 美国提供1000万美元用于获取Signal和WhatsApp黑客狂欢背后的团队信息
articles.contentZh: 至少自3月以来，两个俄罗斯国家集团的行动一直在进行。

articles.title: Notion killing Skiff-influenced email app since most users use AI agents instead
articles.content: Notion is "going all in on using agents to run your inbox."
articles.titleZh: 杀死受Skiff影响的电子邮件应用程序的概念，因为大多数用户使用人工智能代理
articles.contentZh: 概念是“全力以赴使用代理来运行您的收件箱。”

articles.title: One-two punch delivered in global operation disrupts cybercrime "assembly line"
articles.content: "Operation Endgame" simultaneously disrupts two widely used crime tools.
articles.titleZh: 在全球运营中交付的两拳颠覆了网络犯罪“装配线”
articles.contentZh: “结局行动”同时扰乱了两种广泛使用的犯罪工具。

articles.title: Meta is adding ridiculous ‘rate limits’ and a soft paywall to its smart glasses
articles.content: Would you pay $20 a month for access to AI hardware you already own? That appears to be one of Meta's next bets. This week, it quietly announced that your glasses' Conversation Focus feature will soon be limited to three hours of use per month, unless you pay for a $19.99 Meta One Premium subscription. […]
articles.titleZh: Meta为其智能眼镜添加了荒谬的“速率限制”和柔软的付费墙
articles.contentZh: 您是否会每月支付$ 20来访问您已经拥有的人工智能硬件？这似乎是Meta的下一个赌注之一。本周，它悄然宣布，您的眼镜的“对话焦点”功能将很快被限制为每月三个小时的使用时间，除非您支付$ 19.99 Meta One Premium订阅费用。[…]

articles.title: Anthropic’s long-sidelined Fable 5 is greenlit to return
articles.content: After weeks of negotiating with the Trump administration, Anthropic is finally going to be able to bring Claude Fable 5 back online. In a post on X, Anthropic said it plans to begin restoring access Wednesday to users globally on Claude platforms, and that the company would re-enable access on AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft […]
articles.titleZh: Anthropic长篇旁白的寓言5即将回归
articles.contentZh: 经过与特朗普政府数周的谈判， Anthropic终于能够将Claude Fable 5重新上线。Anthropic在X上的一篇文章中表示，它计划于周三开始恢复Claude平台上全球用户的访问权限，该公司将重新启用AWS、Google Cloud和Microsoft […]上的访问权限。
